lyric_text:
On a dark de sert high way, cool wind in my hair

Warm smell of col itas, rising up thro ugh the air

Up a head in the dis tance, I saw a shim mer ing light

My head grew hea vy and my sight grew dim

I had to stop for the night





We lcome to the Ho tel Ca li for nia

Such a lovely place, Such a lovely face

Plen ty of rooms at the Ho tel Ca li for nia

Any time of year, you can find it here
